description: Review + edit "best areas to stay in Puerto Vallarta" article. Include nuances for week-long vs. snowbird (1-4 month) stays. Add popular areas for longer-term visitors.
Review company overview doc from Mariana. Suggest edits, esp. re: ocean-based vs. land-based tour balance. Ensure all tours accurately represented.
Brainstorm article angle: expat/snowbird guide to local promotions in May/Sept. Include proof of residency requirements, discount periods, application process.
Create doc detailing Cancun Adventures tour differences. Focus on locations (Isla Mujeres vs Cozumel), activities (snorkeling quality), distances from popular areas.
